hero.title: One stop solution for your transport needs
hero.description: Mongolian Railway provides reliable and safe transportation services, playing a vital role in the economic development of Mongolia.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: History, mission and values of Mongolian Railway
about.introTitle: Quick & powerful solution for transport services
about.introDescription: Mongolian Railway JSC has been a leading force in Mongolia's transportation sector since 1949. We provide reliable, safe, and efficient passenger and cargo transport services across the nation.

history.title: Our History
history.description: Mongolian Railway JSC has been a leading force in Mongolia's transportation sector since 1949.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Supporting Mongolia's economic development by providing safe, reliable and accessible railway transportation services.

passenger.title: Passenger Transport
passenger.description: Reliable domestic and international passenger transportation services. Online ticketing, comfortable seating, and punctual schedules.

cargo.title: Cargo Transport
cargo.description: Reliable and efficient transportation for mining exports and imports. Coal, copper, and container transport services.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Railway infrastructure maintenance, renovation, and expansion projects.

international.title: International Transport
international.description: Cross-border transportation corridors and international partnerships. Transit transport to Russia and China.

features.title: Quickest delivery & amazingly affordable
features.subtitle: With decades of experience and a professional team, we leverage modern technology to deliver world-class transportation services.

fast.title: Quickest Transport
fast.description: Fast and efficient transportation to every corner of Mongolia.

growing.title: Sustainable Growth
growing.description: New railway construction and technology modernization underway.

testimonials.title: What people say about transport
testimonials.quote: Mongolian Railway has been an exceptional partner in transporting our cargo reliably and on time. Their professional team and efficient service are their greatest strengths.
testimonials.author: B. Batbold

1.title: Tavan Tolgoi - Zuunbayan new railway line
1.excerpt: Construction of the Tavan Tolgoi-Zuunbayan railway is progressing successfully.

2.title: Participation in International Railway Forum
2.excerpt: MTZ representatives participated in the international railway forum to expand cooperation.

3.title: New passenger wagons put into service
3.excerpt: Modern passenger wagons equipped with latest technology have been put into service.
